{"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/159286161?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/vnth4nhnt", "id": 159286161, "login": "vnth4nhnt", "node_id": "U_kgDOCX6DkQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/vnth4nhnt", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:N/VI:N/VA:N/SC:H/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-59", "name": "Improper Link Resolution Before File Access ('Link Following')"}], "description": "**Affected versions:** v0.123.0 through v0.163.0. Earlier versions are not affected.
**Fixed in:** v0.163.1.
**Severity:** Medium. Requires the attacker to be able to place (or convince a site author to place) a symlink inside a mounted directory — for example, inside a locally-vendored theme under `themes/`. Themes mounted as Go modules from GitHub have symlinks stripped on download and are not affected. Multi-directory walks (e.g. content/asset walking) were not affected either; only direct lookups via `resources.Get` followed symlinks.

**Description.** Hugo's virtual filesystem is designed so that files under a mount cannot reach outside the mount tree. A regression introduced in v0.123.0 caused `RootMappingFs.statRoot` to call `Stat` (which follows symlinks) instead of `Lstat`, so a direct `os.ReadFile "somefile"` where `somefile` was a symlink pointing outside the mount would return the target's contents. This effectively let a symlink planted inside a theme or local mount read arbitrary files reachable to the user running `hugo`.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c3wq-j5vh-68rc", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T17:45:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c3wq-j5vh-68rc", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c3wq-j5vh-68rc"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T17:45:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo/security/advisories/GHSA-c3wq-j5vh-68rc", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c3wq-j5vh-68rc"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/gohugoio/hugo/security-advisories/GHSA-c3wq-j5vh-68rc", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/gohugoio/hugo", "summary": "Hugo: Symlink confinement bypass in os.ReadFile", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T17:45:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c3wq-j5vh-68rc", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.163.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/gohugoio/hugo"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.123.0, < 0.163.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Hugo: Symlink confinement bypass in os.ReadFile
